title: Chandigarh's Aarush Singhal Tops JEE Main 2026; 26 Students Secure 100 Percentile
description: JEE Main 2026 Session 2 Result: The category-wise cut-off percentile for eligibility to appear in JEE Advanced 2026 has also been announced. The cut-off for the unreserved (UR) category stands at 93.41 percentile.
